#  Create a Budget Snapshot 
##  Background 
The Budget tool's Create Snapshot feature lets users capture snapshots of the Budget or Forecasting tab in its current state. Once captured, users can immediately view or export it to CSV or PDF. To learn about the different snapshot types available, see [What is the difference between an ad-hoc snapshot and a project status snapshot?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-an-ad-hoc-snapshot-and-a-project-status-snapshot)
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To create a snapshot_ , 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's Budget tool.
    * _To view all snapshots created by any user_ , 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Budget tool.


##  Steps 
### Create a Snapshot from the Budget Tab
Users can create a Project Status Snapshot or an Ad Hoc Snapshot from the Budget tab. Only Project Status Snapshots are saved.
##### Did you know?
You can now edit a snapshot's name, type, and description directly from the budget banner without needing to delete and recreate it. To learn more, see [Edit a Budget Snapshot](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/edit-a-budget-snapshot).
  1. Navigate to the project's **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Budget** tab.
  3. Click **Create Snapshot**.  
This opens the Create Snapshot window.   
  
![Create Project Status Snapshot](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/943b8b220c8e9cea356513d12b40a126/808d4dc92c7bb70492aba10747bc9884/create-project-status-snapshot.png?fm=webp&h=498)  

  4. Under **Snapshot Type** , choose an option:
     * **Project status**. Choose this option for official reporting, such as a monthly report that needs review.
     * **Ad hoc**. Choose this option for a simple snapshot.
  5. Enter the snapshot information:
     * **Name**. Enter a name for the snapshot.
     * **View**. Select a budget view for the snapshot.
     * **Description**. Enter a description of the snapshot.
  6. Click **Create**.   
When complete, the **Snapshot Created** banner appears at the top of the page.  
  
![View Snapshot Data](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5a62a2aaea1f8f065431b60c024880b1/d8f207cfa70f228361825a2099808bff/view-snapshot-data.png?fm=webp&h=126)


### Create a Snapshot from the Forecasting Tab
Users can create an ad hoc snapshot from the Forecasting tab.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Forecasting** tab.
  3. Click **Create Snapshot**.  
This opens the Create Snapshot window.   
  
![Create Forecast Ad Hoc Snapshot](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/18390eccd0b1ebb907040a9bef52a7f1/06a110cf8eaf58eb083cb2e21116ac90/create-forecast-ad-hoc-snapshot.png?fm=webp&h=308)  

  4. Enter the snapshot information:
     * **Name**. Enter a name for the snapshot.
     * **View**. Select a budget view for the snapshot.
     * **Description**. Enter a description of the snapshot.
  5. Click **Create**.  
When complete, the **Snapshot Created** banner appears at the top of the page.


## See Also
  * [View a Snapshot from the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/view-a-snapshot-from-the-budget-tool)
  * [Analyze Variance Between Budget Snapshots](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/analyze-variances-between-budget-snapshots)
  * [Export a Snapshot from the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/export-a-snapshot-from-the-budget-tool)
title: Create a Budget Snapshot
description: How to take a snapshot of the current budget.
